text.title: xUnit Testing Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping test scope to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: unit test: no fixture, mock collaborators with precise matchers, FluentAssertions on results

branch.question: Is `Program` exposed as `public partial class Program`?

conclusion.verdict: skip-this-methodology: add Program shim first, then re-enter the tree

branch.question: Does the code rely on relational constraints (FK / unique index / transactions)?

conclusion.verdict: slice test with Testcontainers (real DB engine) — UseInMemoryDatabase forbidden
slice test with SQLite-in-memory; share via IClassFixture

text.example: target=controller_or_endpoint → program_public=true → integration test with WebApplicationFactory; IClassFixture for shared host; FluentAssertions on JSON; async Task methods.
